name: deadzonev2
description: Multiplayer FPS game inspired by Deadshot.io

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r client/public/* dist/ && sed -i 's|__SOCKET_URL__|'"$SOCKET_URL"'|g' dist/index.html && echo 'Built at $(date)' > dist/built.txt
